title: SEND reform: Education Secretary writes to the Education Select Committee
body: "A letter from Secretary of State for Education, Bridget Phillipson to Helen Hayes, Chair of the Education Select Committee following their report Solving the SEND Crisis.  The letter includes information about:   support measures the government is investing in a period of engagement to test future policy options with:  parents educators  SEND experts representative organisations   the government’s 5 principles for SEND reform   "

taxons.title: Special educational needs and disability (SEND) and high needs
Support for children with special educational needs and disabilities (SEND)
